meta.title: AWS Overseas | Product Sourcing & International Shipping from India
meta.description: AWS Overseas sources, verifies, and exports products from India, then moves them worldwide through Air Freight, Sea Freight, Customs Clearance, and Door-to-Door delivery — one export partner from factory floor to your dock.

hero.badge: Your Complete Product Sourcing & Shipping Partner
hero.title: Source. Verify. Export. Deliver.
hero.subtitle: We source products from verified Indian manufacturers, inspect every order for quality, prepare export documentation, and manage worldwide shipping and delivery — one partner for the entire journey from factory to your door.

exportHero.title: From India's Manufacturers to Your Market
exportHero.subtitle: Browse our catalog of Indian-made goods, sourced directly from verified manufacturers, quality-checked, documented, and shipped under one roof — with no middlemen to slow you down.

trustedPartners.title: Trusted by Businesses Worldwide
trustedPartners.description: Helping businesses source and export products across multiple industries from verified Indian manufacturers, then move them worldwide with dependable shipping.

certifications.title: Certified Excellence in Global Trade
certifications.description: Recognized by leading Indian and international authorities, our sourcing and export operations meet international sourcing standards, export compliance requirements, quality assurance protocols, and global trade regulations.

items.name: Udyog Aadhaar
items.issuer: Ministry of MSME, Government of India

items.name: APEDA
items.issuer: Agricultural & Processed Food Products Export Development Authority

items.name: FICCI Member
items.issuer: Federation of Indian Chambers of Commerce & Industry

items.name: MSME Registered
items.issuer: Ministry of Micro, Small & Medium Enterprises

about.title: One Partner for Sourcing and Shipping
about.description: AWS Overseas operates as both your sourcing desk in India and your freight forwarder to the world. We identify and verify manufacturers, inspect goods before dispatch, prepare export documentation, and manage Air Freight, Sea Freight, Customs Clearance, Warehousing, and Door-to-Door Delivery — so a single conversation with us covers product to port to dock.

services.title: Sourcing and Shipping, Under One Desk
services.subtitle: From finding the right manufacturer in India to delivering at your door — services that cover both sides of an export order.

items.title: Product Sourcing
items.description: We identify and shortlist manufacturers in India matched to your specifications and order volume.

items.title: Supplier Verification
items.description: On-ground checks confirm a manufacturer's capacity, compliance, and production standards before you commit.

items.title: Quality Inspection
items.description: Pre-shipment inspection catches defects and spec mismatches before goods leave the factory.

items.title: Export Documentation
items.description: Commercial invoices, packing lists, certificates of origin, and HS classification prepared and filed correctly.

items.title: Freight Forwarding
items.description: Air and sea freight booked through carrier partners, with FCL and LCL options for bulk cargo.

items.title: Door Delivery
items.description: Customs clearance and final-mile delivery handled end-to-end, right to your destination.

items.title: Cargo Tracking
items.description: Monitor sourcing status and shipment location in real time from a single dashboard.

items.title: Verified Manufacturers
items.description: Direct access to vetted suppliers across major Indian production regions, not a reseller's markup.

items.title: Competitive Product Pricing
items.description: Factory-direct sourcing keeps product cost, freight, and duties transparent and quoted upfront.

items.title: Quality Assurance
items.description: Every order is inspected against your specification before it leaves the factory floor.

items.title: Export Expertise
items.description: Certificates, HS codes, and customs paperwork prepared by people who file them daily.

items.title: International Shipping
items.description: Air and sea freight, customs clearance, and door-to-door delivery managed under one roof.

items.title: Single Point of Contact
items.description: The same team manages your order from supplier search through final delivery.

steps.title: Share Requirements
steps.description: Tell us the product, specification, and quantity you need sourced or exported.

steps.title: Supplier Selection
steps.description: We shortlist verified manufacturers in India matched to your requirement and confirm pricing.

steps.title: Product Sampling
steps.description: Request samples before committing to a full production run, so specifications are confirmed upfront.

steps.title: Quality Inspection
steps.description: Every order is inspected against your specification before it leaves the factory floor.

steps.title: Export Documentation
steps.description: Commercial invoices, packing lists, certificates of origin, and HS classification prepared and filed.

steps.title: International Shipping
steps.description: Goods move by air or sea with customs clearance handled by our team at both ends.

steps.title: Delivery
steps.description: Track your shipment door-to-door until it reaches its destination.

mobileApp.title: Manage Sourcing and Shipping From Our Mobile App
mobileApp.description: Manage sourcing requests, monitor inspections, receive quotations, and track shipments — all from your smartphone, from first enquiry to final delivery.

tracking.title: Track Your Shipment
tracking.description: Enter your tracking number to check the latest shipment status.

testimonials.title: What Our Clients Say
testimonials.description: Businesses worldwide work with AWS Overseas to source verified products from India, backed by quality inspection, supplier support, and dependable delivery.

coverage.title: Global Sourcing & Delivery Network
coverage.description: Supplier to port, port to destination — we manage the full route across Asia, Europe, North America, South America, Africa, and the Middle East as one connected, end-to-end process.

products.title: Products We Source & Export
products.description: We source products directly from trusted Indian manufacturers and export them worldwide — browse a preview below, or send an enquiry on anything you don't see listed.

blogs.title: Global Trade & Product Sourcing Insights
blogs.description: Stay updated with supplier sourcing guides, export documentation, shipping regulations, and trade news.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Find answers to the most common questions about product sourcing, supplier verification, and international shipping.

downloadApp.title: Download the AWS Overseas Mobile App
downloadApp.description: Manage sourcing requests, monitor inspections, receive quotations, and track shipments anytime, anywhere — stay connected from first enquiry through final delivery.
